[Process Doc Update]: Create README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs with project management processes summary and links

## Which process document do you want to update?
<new document>

## Summary of New Content
Create a comprehensive README for the OctoAcme Project Management Docs that serves as a central hub for all documentation. The README should:
- Provide a brief overview/summary of OctoAcme's project management processes
- Include organized links to all process documentation files in the docs folder
- Serve as an entry point for team members to understand the complete project management framework

## Why is this update needed?
The docs folder contains multiple specialized process documents, but there's currently no central hub to navigate them. A README will:
- Improve onboarding for new team members
- Provide a high-level summary of all processes in one place
- Make it easier for teams to discover relevant documentation
- Establish a single source of truth for project management practices

## Suggested Content

### OctoAcme Project Management Documentation Hub

**Overview:**
OctoAcme follows a comprehensive, phase-based project management approach designed to ensure successful project delivery. Our processes span from initial project conception through retrospective analysis, with emphasis on clear roles, risk management, and continuous improvement.

**Project Management Process Phases:**

1. **Project Initiation** - Establishing project foundations, stakeholder alignment, and resource allocation
2. **Project Planning** - Defining scope, timelines, deliverables, and success metrics
3. **Execution & Tracking** - Managing daily operations, monitoring progress, and maintaining schedules
4. **Risk Management & Communication** - Identifying risks, managing stakeholder communications, and escalation procedures
5. **Release & Deployment** - Preparing releases, managing deployments, and ensuring production readiness
6. **Retrospectives & Continuous Improvement** - Learning from each project cycle and refining processes

**Documentation by Role:**
- [Roles & Personas](./octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) - Overview of all team roles and responsibilities

**Complete Process Documents:**
- [Project Management Overview](./octoacme-project-management-overview.md) - High-level framework overview
- [Project Initiation](./octoacme-project-initiation.md) - Process for starting new projects
- [Project Planning](./octoacme-project-planning.md) - Detailed planning procedures
- [Execution & Tracking](./octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md) - Day-to-day execution and monitoring
- [Risks & Communication](./octoacme-risks-and-communication.md) - Risk management and stakeholder communication
- [Release & Deployment](./octoacme-release-and-deployment.md) - Release management procedures
- [Retrospectives & Continuous Improvement](./octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md) - Post-project reviews and process improvement

## Acceptance Criteria
